N1.label: Growth/Recovery
N1.description: Amcor executes successfully on its pending Berry Global merger integration, capturing the guided US$650M+ in synergies while end-market volumes recover as consumer staples destocking cycles normalise.
N1.plain_english: Amcor executes successfully on its pending Berry Global merger integration, capturing the guided US$650M+ in synergies while end-market volumes recover as consumer staples destocking cycles normalise.
N1.what_to_watch: Next earnings result, operational update, and macro developments.
N1.upside: Material re-rating if scenario plays out.
N1.risk_plain: Monitor for change in probability weight.

N2.label: Base Case
N2.description: Amcor continues to generate stable, defensive cash flows from its global flexible and rigid packaging operations, sustaining its dividend while gradually deleveraging. The stock trades in a range arou
N2.plain_english: Amcor continues to generate stable, defensive cash flows from its global flexible and rigid packaging operations, sustaining its dividend while gradually deleveraging. The stock trades in a range arou
N2.what_to_watch: Next earnings result, operational update, and macro developments.
N2.risk_plain: Monitor for change in probability weight.

N3.label: Risk/Downside
N3.description: Amcor's A$16.2B debt load becomes increasingly problematic in a higher-for-longer interest rate environment, consuming free cash flow and potentially forcing a dividend cut or dilutive equity raise. I
N3.plain_english: Amcor's A$16.2B debt load becomes increasingly problematic in a higher-for-longer interest rate environment, consuming free cash flow and potentially forcing a dividend cut or dilutive equity raise. I
N3.what_to_watch: Next earnings result, operational update, and macro developments.
N3.risk_plain: Significant downside if this scenario crystallises.

N4.label: Disruption/Catalyst
N4.description: A tail scenario in which either the Berry Global merger closes with better-than-expected synergy guidance, a strategic acquirer bids for Amcor at a premium, or an activist investor forces a portfolio
N4.plain_english: A tail scenario in which either the Berry Global merger closes with better-than-expected synergy guidance, a strategic acquirer bids for Amcor at a premium, or an activist investor forces a portfolio
N4.what_to_watch: Next earnings result, operational update, and macro developments.
N4.risk_plain: Significant downside if this scenario crystallises.

big_picture: Amcor at A$58.06 is priced as a leveraged defensive compounder in a holding pattern -- the market is neither panicking nor celebrating, but is demanding proof of the earnings recovery before awarding a higher multiple.
